data.name: InvalidRange
data.value: {PropertyName} is out of the allowed range.

data.name: EitherVendorOrDriverRequired
data.value: Either Vendor ID or Driver ID must be provided.

data.name: InvalidDateRange
data.value: End date must be after start date.

data.name: AccountNotFound
data.value: No account found with this phone number or email. Please register first.

data.name: AccountEmailNotVerified
data.value: Your email address is not verified yet. Please verify your account using the OTP sent to your email before logging in.

data.name: UserAccountNotActive
data.value: User account is no longer active.

data.name: InvalidOtpLength
data.value: Verification code must be exactly 4 digits.

data.name: PasswordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: PasswordResetOtpSent
data.value: If the account is registered, an OTP has been sent.

data.name: PasswordResetEmailBody
data.value:
Your password reset code is: {0}
This code is valid for 15 minutes only.

data.name: VendorInvalidStatusForApproval
data.value: Vendor can only be approved from PendingReview status. Current status: {0}.

data.name: VendorInvalidStatusForRejection
data.value: Vendor can only be rejected from PendingReview status. Current status: {0}.

data.name: VendorInvalidStatusForSuspension
data.value: Vendor can only be suspended from Active status. Current status: {0}.

data.name: VendorInvalidStatusForReactivation
data.value: Vendor can only be reactivated from Suspended status. Current status: {0}.

data.name: InvalidCommissionRate
data.value: Commission rate must be between 0 and 100.

data.name: USER_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Email or phone is already registered.

data.name: OtpEmailBody
data.value:
Zadana - Verification Code

Your verification code is:

{0}

This code is valid for 5 minutes only.

data.name: VENDOR_MISSING_CART_PRODUCT
data.value: The selected vendor does not offer all products currently in the cart.

data.name: EMPTY_CART
data.value: Cannot place an order with an empty cart.

data.name: INVALID_FILE_EXTENSION
data.value: Invalid file extension. Allowed extensions are: {0}

data.name: FEATURE_UNDER_REFACTORING
data.value: This feature is currently under refactoring.

data.name: UNAUTHORIZED_VIEW_REQUESTS
data.value: You are not authorized to view these requests.

data.name: VENDOR_LOGIN_REQUIRED
data.value: You must be logged in as a vendor.

data.name: VENDORS_ONLY
data.value: Only vendors can request new products.

data.name: UNAUTHORIZED_REVIEW_REQUESTS
data.value: You are not authorized to review product requests.

data.name: REQUEST_ALREADY_REVIEWED
data.value: This request has already been reviewed.

data.name: VENDOR_NOT_VERIFIED
data.value: You cannot add products until your account is verified by the administration.

data.name: USER_NOT_AUTHENTICATED
data.value: User not authenticated or session expired.

data.name: RejectionReasonRequired
data.value: Rejection reason is required when rejecting.

data.name: RejectionReasonTooLong
data.value: Rejection reason must not exceed 500 characters.

data.name: OtpSentToEmail
data.value: Verification code has been sent to your email.

data.name: OtpSentToPhone
data.value: Verification code has been sent to your phone.

data.name: ServerErrorMessage
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: GuestFavoritesHeaderRequired
data.value: User is not authenticated. Send {0} header for guest favorites access.

data.name: GuestCartHeaderRequired
data.value: User is not authenticated. Send {0} header for guest cart access.

data.name: BrandMustBeLinkedToSubcategory
data.value: Brand must be linked to a subcategory, not a main category.

data.name: DRIVER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: No driver profile found for the current user.

data.name: DRIVER_NOT_READY_FOR_DISPATCH
data.value: Your account must be reviewed and approved by admin before performing this action.

data.name: DRIVER_NOT_ASSIGNED
data.value: You are not assigned to this order.

data.name: PICKUP_OTP_REQUIRED
data.value: Pickup OTP must be verified by the vendor before marking the order as picked up.

data.name: DELIVERY_OTP_REQUIRED
data.value: Delivery OTP must be verified by the customer before completing delivery.

data.name: DELIVERY_FAILURE_NOTE_REQUIRED
data.value: A note explaining the delivery failure reason is required.

data.name: INVALID_ORDER_STATUS_TRANSITION
data.value: This status transition is not allowed.

data.name: INVALID_ARRIVAL_STATE_TRANSITION
data.value: This arrival state change is not allowed at the current stage.

data.name: ASSIGNMENT_NOT_OWNED
data.value: You can only perform this action for your assigned deliveries.

data.name: PICKUP_OTP_INVALID
data.value: Incorrect pickup OTP. Please check the code and try again.

data.name: DELIVERY_OTP_INVALID
data.value: Incorrect delivery OTP. Please check the code and try again.

data.name: INVALID_PROOF_STATE
data.value: Delivery proof can only be submitted for active assignments.

data.name: DRIVER_SOFT_BLOCKED_BY_REJECTIONS
data.value: You have exceeded the offer rejection limit. Please try again later.

data.name: DRIVER_PAYOUT_METHOD_REQUIRED
data.value: Add a primary payout method before requesting a withdrawal.

data.name: INVALID_CITY
data.value: Selected city does not belong to the chosen region.

data.name: CHECKOUT_VENDOR_UNAVAILABLE
data.value: No single vendor can fulfill all cart items for checkout.

data.name: CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_REQUIRED
data.value: A delivery address is required. Please add an address before placing an order.

data.name: DELIVERY_PRICING_UNAVAILABLE
data.value: Delivery pricing could not be determined. Please try again.

data.name: INVALID_PROMO_CODE
data.value: Promo code is invalid or expired.

data.name: PROMO_MIN_ORDER_NOT_MET
data.value: Order total does not meet the minimum required for this promo code.

data.name: PROMO_CODE_NOT_APPLICABLE
data.value: This promo code is not applicable to the selected vendor.

data.name: PAYMENT_METHOD_NOT_SUPPORTED
data.value: Selected payment method is not supported.

data.name: PAYMENT_UNAVAILABLE
data.value: Online payment is currently unavailable. Please try another method.

data.name: DELIVERY_SLOT_NOT_AVAILABLE
data.value: Selected delivery slot is not available.

data.name: INVALID_QUANTITY
data.value: Quantity must be greater than zero.

data.name: INVALID_OTP
data.value: Verification code is invalid or expired.

data.name: OTP_COOLDOWN
data.value: Please wait before requesting a new verification code.

data.name: IDENTITY_UPDATE_FAILED
data.value: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

data.name: ACCOUNT_EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED
data.value: Your email is not verified yet. Please verify using the code sent to your email.

data.name: INVALID_REQUEST_BODY
data.value: Request body is missing or invalid.

data.name: ORDER_PLACED_SUCCESS
data.value: Your order has been placed successfully

data.name: PICKUP_OTP_VERIFIED
data.value: Pickup OTP verified and order marked as picked up

data.name: DELIVERY_OTP_VERIFIED
data.value: Delivery OTP verified and order marked as delivered

data.name: OFFER_REJECTED
data.value: Offer rejected. Waiting for the next offer

data.name: BANK_INVALID_STATUS
data.value: Bank account status does not allow this action.

data.name: BANK_NOT_VERIFIED
data.value: Bank account is not verified yet.

data.name: INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS
data.value: Insufficient funds to complete this transaction.

data.name: INVALID_WITHDRAWAL_AMOUNT
data.value: Withdrawal amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: PAYOUT_INVALID_STATUS
data.value: Payout cannot be modified in its current status.

data.name: BRAND_CATEGORY_MISMATCH
data.value: Brand does not belong to the specified category.

data.name: BRAND_CATEGORY_MUST_BE_NESTED
data.value: Brand category must be a nested sub-category.

data.name: BRAND_REQUEST_NOT_APPROVED
data.value: Brand request has not been approved yet.

data.name: CATEGORY_DEPTH_EXCEEDED
data.value: Maximum category depth has been exceeded.

data.name: CATEGORY_LEVEL_NOT_SUPPORTED
data.value: This category level is not supported.

data.name: CATEGORY_REQUEST_NOT_APPROVED
data.value: Category request has not been approved yet.

data.name: INVALID_CATEGORY_PARENT_LEVEL
data.value: The selected parent category does not match the requested level.

data.name: DELIVERY_OFFER_NOT_AVAILABLE
data.value: This delivery offer is no longer available.

data.name: NO_ASSIGNED_DRIVER
data.value: No assigned driver was found for this order.

data.name: IDENTITY_ACTIVATE_FAILED
data.value: Failed to activate the account. Please try again.

data.name: IDENTITY_ARCHIVE_FAILED
data.value: Failed to archive the account. Please try again.

data.name: IDENTITY_LOCK_FAILED
data.value: Failed to lock the account. Please try again.

data.name: IDENTITY_RESET_PASSWORD_FAILED
data.value: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

data.name: IDENTITY_SUSPEND_FAILED
data.value: Failed to suspend the account. Please try again.

data.name: IDENTITY_UNLOCK_FAILED
data.value: Failed to unlock the account. Please try again.

data.name: ORDER_CANNOT_BE_CANCELLED
data.value: Order cannot be cancelled at the current stage.

data.name: ORDER_COMPLAINT_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: A complaint has already been submitted for this order.

data.name: INVALID_DATE_RANGE
data.value: End date must be greater than or equal to start date.

data.name: INVALID_TIME_FORMAT
data.value: Time must be in HH:mm or HH:mm:ss format.

data.name: INVALID_FEATURED_MASTER_PRODUCT
data.value: Selected master product is not eligible for featured placement.

data.name: INVALID_FEATURED_VENDOR_PRODUCT
data.value: Selected vendor product is not eligible for featured placement.

data.name: INVALID_HOME_SECTION_CATEGORY
data.value: Category is required for this home section.

data.name: INVALID_HOME_SECTION_PRODUCTS_TAKE
data.value: Products count must be between 1 and 20.

data.name: INVALID_HOME_SECTION_SUBCATEGORY
data.value: Home section must reference a sub-category.

data.name: VENDOR_LOGIN_LOCKED
data.value: Unlock vendor login instead of reactivating the account.

data.name: VendorAlreadyApproved
data.value: Vendor is already approved and does not need another approval.

data.name: VendorInvalidStatusForLock
data.value: Vendor cannot be locked in its current status.

data.name: VendorRejectionReasonRequired
data.value: A clear rejection reason is required.

data.name: VendorSuspensionReasonRequired
data.value: A clear suspension reason is required.
